intent_template: Is {name} taking prospective graduate students in the upcoming academic year?
intent: Is Yuki Abernathy taking prospective graduate students in the upcoming academic year?

fuzzy_match: Yes, Yuki Abernathy is accepting prospective graduate students. Note: I welcome inquiries from Merrow undergraduates interested in UROP projects at the intersection of literature and computation. I am not currently the primary advisor for graduate students, but I co-advise through the HASTS program.
